basic_details.organization_name: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO) Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ANIIDCO. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANIIDCO Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation: Relaxable by 05 years for ST. Additional relaxation of 10 years for PWD belonging to ST as per DoPT OM No.36035/3/2004-Estt.(RES) dt. 29.12.2005.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in any discipline, Minimum 05 years experience in any field
qualification.details: Post Graduation in any discipline with a minimum of 05 years of experience in any field.

selection_process: Shortlisting of candidates having higher qualification and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIDCO Manager (Purchase & Marketing) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager (Purchase & Marketing) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduation degree in any discipline and have a minimum of 05 years of experience in any relevant field to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Manager (Purchase & Marketing) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Manager (Purchase & Marketing) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Manager (Purchase & Marketing) in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Manager (Purchase & Marketing) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 44900 to Rs. 142400 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their higher qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application with all required documents to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs are required to be attached with the application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and website for more details?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and more details on the official website of ANIIDCO. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
